layers.name: CLI & Tooling
layers.summary_zh: `flask` 命令行、包级公共 API 与应用测试客户端
layers.summary_en: The `flask` command-line, package public API, and the app test client

classes.name: NoAppException
classes.description_zh: 当 `flask` 命令无法定位 Flask 应用实例时抛出的错误。
classes.description_en: Raised when the `flask` command cannot locate a Flask application.

classes.name: find_best_app
classes.description_zh: 在模块中自动发现唯一的 Flask 应用实例或应用工厂。
classes.description_en: Auto-discovers the single Flask app instance or app factory in a module.

classes.signature: def find_app_by_string(module: ModuleType, app_name: str) -> Flask:
classes.description_zh: 将 `module:app` 或工厂调用字符串解析为 Flask 应用。
classes.description_en: Resolves a `module:app` or factory-call string into a Flask application.

classes.signature: def get_version(ctx: click.Context, param: click.Parameter, value: t.Any) -> None:

classes.name: ScriptInfo
classes.description_zh: click 上下文辅助对象,按需加载并缓存目标 Flask 应用。
classes.description_en: Click context helper that lazily loads and caches the target Flask app.

classes.name: AppGroup
classes.description_zh: 命令在应用上下文中执行的 click 命令组基类。
classes.description_en: Click command-group base whose subcommands run inside an app context.

classes.name: _set_app
classes.signature: def _set_app(ctx: click.Context, param: click.Option, value: str | None) -> str | None:

classes.signature: def _env_file_callback( ctx: click.Context, param: click.Option, value: str | None ) -> str | None:

classes.name: FlaskGroup
classes.description_zh: `flask` 根命令组:装配内置命令、加载应用并注入其自定义命令。
classes.description_en: The root `flask` command group: assembles built-in commands, loads the app, and injects its custom CLI commands.

classes.name: load_dotenv
classes.signature: def load_dotenv( path: str | os.PathLike[str] | None = None, load_defaults: bool = True ) -> bool:
classes.description_zh: 将 `.flaskenv` 与 `.env` 文件中的变量载入进程环境。
classes.description_en: Loads variables from `.flaskenv` and `.env` files into the process environment.

classes.name: show_server_banner
classes.signature: def show_server_banner(debug: bool, app_import_path: str | None) -> None:
classes.description_zh: 打印开发服务器启动横幅(地址、调试状态等)。
classes.description_en: Prints the development-server startup banner (address, debug state).

classes.name: _validate_key
classes.signature: def _validate_key(ctx: click.Context, param: click.Parameter, value: t.Any) -> t.Any:

classes.name: run_command
classes.signature: def run_command( info: ScriptInfo, host: str, port: int, reload: bool, debugger: bool, with_threads: bool, cert: ssl.SSLContext | tuple[str, str | None] | t.Literal["adhoc"] | None, extra_files: list[str] | None, exclude_patterns: list[str] | None, ) -> None:
classes.description_zh: `flask run` 命令:加载应用并启动 Werkzeug 开发服务器。
classes.description_en: The `flask run` command: loads the app and starts the Werkzeug development server.

classes.name: routes_command
classes.signature: def routes_command(sort: str, all_methods: bool) -> None:

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: 控制台脚本入口,实例化并调用 `flask` 命令组。
classes.description_en: Console-script entry point that instantiates and invokes the `flask` command group.

classes.name: EnvironBuilder
classes.description_zh: 依据应用配置构造 WSGI environ 的测试请求构建器。
classes.description_en: Builds a WSGI environ honoring the app config for constructing test requests.

classes.name: FlaskClient
classes.description_zh: 绑定到应用的测试客户端,在测试中发起请求并管理会话 Cookie。
classes.description_en: Test client bound to the app for issuing requests and managing session cookies in tests.

classes.name: FlaskCliRunner
classes.description_zh: 用于在测试中调用应用 CLI 命令的 click 测试运行器。
classes.description_en: Click test runner for invoking the app’s CLI commands in tests.

layers.name: Application Core
layers.summary_zh: 具体的 WSGI 应用对象与蓝图,驱动请求分发
layers.summary_en: The concrete WSGI application object & blueprint that drive request dispatch

classes.name: Flask
classes.description_zh: 具体的 WSGI 应用对象,编排从 WSGI 调用到响应的完整请求生命周期。
classes.description_en: The concrete WSGI application object that orchestrates the full request lifecycle from WSGI call to response.

classes.name: Blueprint
classes.description_zh: 具体蓝图:把一组延迟注册的路由与处理器附加到 Flask 应用。
classes.description_en: Concrete blueprint that attaches a group of deferred routes and handlers onto a Flask app.

classes.name: _make_timedelta
classes.signature: def _make_timedelta(value: timedelta | int | None) -> timedelta | None:

layers.name: Sansio Base
layers.summary_zh: 与具体框架无关的基类(路由/错误处理/配置装配),WSGI 与异步共享
layers.summary_en: Framework-agnostic base classes (routing, error handlers, config wiring) shared by WSGI & async

classes.name: _make_timedelta
classes.signature: def _make_timedelta(value: timedelta | int | None) -> timedelta | None:

classes.name: App
classes.description_zh: 与框架无关的应用基类:持有配置、路由表、错误/teardown 处理器注册表与 Jinja 环境。
classes.description_en: Framework-agnostic application base holding config, the URL map, error/teardown handler registries, and the Jinja environment.

classes.name: BlueprintSetupState
classes.description_zh: 在蓝图注册时解析其 url 前缀、子域等设置状态。
classes.description_en: Captures a blueprint’s setup state (url prefix, subdomain) at registration time.

classes.name: Blueprint
classes.description_zh: 蓝图基类:记录延迟注册操作,并在 register 时回放到应用上。
classes.description_en: Blueprint base that records deferred registration operations and replays them onto the app at register time.

classes.name: Scaffold
classes.description_zh: App 与 Blueprint 的共同基类,提供 route/错误处理器装饰器与模板、静态目录解析。
classes.description_en: Shared base for App and Blueprint providing route/handler decorators and template/static folder resolution.

classes.name: find_package
classes.signature: def find_package(import_name: str) -> tuple[str | None, str]:
classes.description_zh: 为导入名定位其所属包/模块路径与前缀。
classes.description_en: Locates the package/module path and prefix for an import name.

layers.name: Context & Wrappers
layers.summary_zh: 请求/应用上下文的压栈出栈与 Request/Response 包装
layers.summary_en: Push/pop of request & app contexts and the Request/Response wrappers

classes.name: _AppCtxGlobals
classes.description_zh: `g` 背后的对象,为当前上下文提供任意属性存储。
classes.description_en: The object behind `g`, providing arbitrary per-context attribute storage.

classes.name: after_this_request
classes.description_zh: 注册一个在本次请求结束时对响应执行的回调。
classes.description_en: Registers a callback to run against the response when the current request ends.

classes.name: copy_current_request_context
classes.description_zh: 包装函数使其携带当前请求上下文,以便在其它线程中运行。
classes.description_en: Wraps a function so it keeps the current request context when run in another thread.

classes.name: AppContext
classes.description_zh: 统一的应用/请求上下文:绑定上下文局部变量、打开会话并完成路由匹配。
classes.description_en: The unified app/request context that binds context-locals, opens the session, and performs route matching.

classes.name: Request
classes.description_zh: Flask 的请求对象子类,附加路由信息(url_rule、view_args、所属蓝图)。
classes.description_en: Flask’s Request subclass adding routing data (url_rule, view_args, blueprint).

classes.name: Response
classes.description_zh: Flask 的响应对象子类,提供 JSON 感知的默认行为。
classes.description_en: Flask’s Response subclass with JSON-aware defaults.

layers.name: Sessions
layers.summary_zh: 会话接口与安全 Cookie 会话实现
layers.summary_en: Session interface and secure-cookie session implementation

classes.name: SessionMixin
classes.description_zh: 会话映射的基础 mixin,跟踪 modified/accessed 等状态标志。
classes.description_en: Base session mixin tracking the modified/accessed state flags.

classes.name: SecureCookieSession
classes.description_zh: 以 dict 存储、跟踪改动并用于签名 Cookie 的默认会话类型。
classes.description_en: Dict-backed session that tracks modifications for storage in a signed cookie.

classes.name: SessionInterface
classes.description_zh: 会话策略的抽象接口:打开/保存会话与决定 Cookie 属性。
classes.description_en: Abstract policy interface for opening/saving sessions and deciding cookie attributes.

classes.name: SecureCookieSessionInterface
classes.description_zh: 默认会话接口,经 itsdangerous 把会话数据签名进客户端 Cookie。
classes.description_en: Default session interface that signs session data into the client cookie via itsdangerous.

classes.name: DispatchingJinjaLoader
classes.description_zh: 在应用与全部蓝图的模板目录中查找模板的 Jinja 加载器。
classes.description_en: Jinja loader that searches the app’s and all blueprints’ template folders.

classes.name: _render
classes.signature: def _render(ctx: AppContext, template: Template, context: dict[str, t.Any]) -> str:

classes.name: render_template
classes.signature: def render_template( template_name_or_list: str | Template | list[str | Template], **context: t.Any, ) -> str:
classes.description_zh: 在当前应用上下文中按名渲染模板。
classes.description_en: Renders a named template within the current application context.

classes.name: render_template_string
classes.description_zh: 从源字符串渲染一个模板。
classes.description_en: Renders a template from a source string.

classes.name: _stream
classes.signature: def _stream( ctx: AppContext, template: Template, context: dict[str, t.Any] ) -> t.Iterator[str]:

classes.name: stream_template
classes.signature: def stream_template( template_name_or_list: str | Template | list[str | Template], **context: t.Any, ) -> t.Iterator[str]:
classes.description_zh: 把模板渲染为可作为流式响应使用的字符串迭代器。
classes.description_en: Renders a template as a string iterator usable as a streaming response.

layers.name: JSON
layers.summary_zh: JSON 提供者与带标签的 JSON 序列化

classes.name: dumps
classes.description_zh: 经当前应用的 JSON 提供者序列化数据(无应用时回退到标准库)。
classes.description_en: Serializes data via the current app’s JSON provider (falling back to the stdlib when no app).

classes.name: dump
classes.signature: def dump(obj: t.Any, fp: t.IO[str], **kwargs: t.Any) -> None:

classes.name: loads
classes.signature: def loads(s: str | bytes, **kwargs: t.Any) -> t.Any:
classes.description_zh: 经当前应用的 JSON 提供者反序列化字符串。
classes.description_en: Deserializes a string via the current app’s JSON provider.

classes.name: load
classes.description_zh: 经提供者从文件对象反序列化 JSON。
classes.description_en: Deserializes JSON from a file object via the provider.

classes.name: jsonify
classes.description_zh: 用当前应用的提供者把参数构造为一个 JSON 响应对象。
classes.description_en: Builds a JSON Response object from its arguments using the current app’s provider.

classes.name: JSONProvider
classes.description_zh: 绑定到应用的 JSON 序列化抽象提供者接口。
classes.description_en: Abstract JSON-serialization provider interface bound to an app.

classes.name: DefaultJSONProvider
classes.description_zh: 默认提供者,内置支持 datetime、UUID、dataclass 等类型。
classes.description_en: Default provider with built-in support for datetime, UUID, dataclass and similar types.

classes.name: JSONTag
classes.description_zh: 带标签 JSON 类型处理器的基类(check / tag / to_python)。
classes.description_en: Base class for tagged-JSON type handlers (check / tag / to_python).

classes.name: TaggedJSONSerializer
classes.description_zh: 在已注册的 JSONTag 处理器间分发,以紧凑表示非原生 JSON 类型。
classes.description_en: Serializer that dispatches across registered JSONTag handlers to compactly represent non-native JSON types.

classes.name: View
classes.description_zh: 类视图基类;`as_view` 把类转换为可注册的视图函数。
classes.description_en: Base class-based view; `as_view` turns the class into a registrable view function.

classes.name: MethodView
classes.description_zh: 按 HTTP 方法把请求分派到对应的 get/post/... 实例方法。
classes.description_en: Dispatches requests by HTTP method to the matching get/post/... instance methods.

layers.name: Foundation
layers.summary_zh: 上下文局部代理、配置、信号与跨子系统的工具函数
layers.summary_en: Context-local proxies, config, signals, and cross-subsystem helpers

classes.name: Config
classes.description_zh: 从文件、对象或环境变量加载配置的 dict 子类。
classes.description_en: Dict subclass that loads configuration from files, objects, or environment variables.

classes.name: explain_template_loading_attempts
classes.signature: def explain_template_loading_attempts( app: App, template: str, attempts: list[ tuple[ BaseLoader, Scaffold, tuple[str, str | None, t.Callable[[], bool] | None] | None, ] ], ) -> None:

classes.name: get_debug_flag
classes.description_zh: 从 FLASK_DEBUG 环境变量读取调试标志。
classes.description_en: Reads the debug flag from the FLASK_DEBUG environment variable.

classes.name: get_load_dotenv
classes.description_zh: 判断是否应加载 dotenv 文件。
classes.description_en: Decides whether dotenv files should be loaded.

classes.description_zh: 把视图返回值规整为完整的 Response 对象。
classes.description_en: Normalizes a view’s return value into a full Response object.

classes.description_en: Generates a URL for an endpoint name and arguments (reverse routing).

classes.signature: def get_template_attribute(template_name: str, attribute: str) -> t.Any:

classes.signature: def flash(message: str, category: str = "message") -> None:
classes.description_zh: 记录一条闪现消息,供下一个请求渲染时取出。
classes.description_en: Records a flash message to be retrieved on the next request.

classes.name: get_flashed_messages
classes.signature: def get_flashed_messages( with_categories: bool = False, category_filter: t.Iterable[str] = () ) -> list[str] | list[tuple[str, str]]:

classes.name: send_file
classes.signature: def send_file( path_or_file: os.PathLike[t.AnyStr] | str | t.IO[bytes], mimetype: str | None = None, as_attachment: bool = False, download_name: str | None = None, conditional: bool = True, etag: bool | str = True, last_modified: datetime | int | float | None = None, max_age: None | (int | t.Callable[[str | None], int | None]) = None, ) -> Response:
classes.description_zh: 以正确的头部把一个文件作为响应发送。
classes.description_en: Sends a file as a response with the appropriate headers.

classes.name: send_from_directory
classes.signature: def send_from_directory( directory: os.PathLike[str] | str, path: os.PathLike[str] | str, **kwargs: t.Any, ) -> Response:
classes.description_zh: 安全地从某目录发送文件,防止路径穿越。

classes.name: get_root_path
classes.description_zh: 解析一个导入包的文件系统根路径。
classes.description_en: Resolves the filesystem root path of an imported package.

classes.name: create_logger
classes.description_zh: 为应用创建并配置带默认处理器的日志记录器。
classes.description_en: Creates and configures the application logger with a default handler.

layer_groups.name: Request Subsystems
layer_groups.summary_zh: 应用核心组合的并列请求处理子系统
layer_groups.summary_en: Parallel request-handling subsystems composed by the application core

flows.name_zh: 一次 WSGI 请求的完整生命周期
flows.description_zh: 从 WSGI 服务器调用到返回响应字节流,贯穿上下文、会话、路由与视图分发的端到端主链路。
flows.description_en: End-to-end main chain from the WSGI server call to returned response bytes, threading context, session, routing and view dispatch.

steps.label_en: process_response → save_session writes the cookie back

flows.name_zh: `flask run` 应用发现与开发服务器
flows.description_zh: `flask run` 如何定位应用对象并启动 Werkzeug 开发服务器。
flows.description_en: How `flask run` locates the application object and starts the Werkzeug development server.

steps.label_zh: 导入模块并实例化 Flask
run_simple(host, port, app):启动开发服务器
steps.label_en: run_simple(host, port, app): start the dev server

flows.description_zh: 构造 Flask 应用并通过 sansio 基类把路由与处理器注册进 Werkzeug URL Map。
flows.description_en: Constructing the Flask app and registering routes/handlers into the Werkzeug URL Map via the sansio base.

steps.label_zh: App.__init__:配置 / Jinja 环境 / URL Map
steps.label_en: App.__init__: config / Jinja env / URL Map

steps.label_zh: find_package():定位根路径与静态目录
steps.label_en: find_package(): resolve root path & static folder

flows.name_zh: 请求上下文压栈与出栈
flows.description_zh: 上下文如何绑定 request/session/g 代理、加载会话与路由匹配,并在结束时 teardown。
flows.description_en: How the context binds the request/session/g proxies, loads the session and matches routing, then tears down at the end.

steps.label_zh: request / session / g 指向本上下文
steps.label_en: request / session / g point at this context

flows.description_zh: render_template 经 DispatchingJinjaLoader 跨应用与蓝图查找模板,注入上下文并渲染。
flows.description_en: render_template finds templates across app and blueprint folders via DispatchingJinjaLoader, injects context and renders.

steps.label_zh: 搜索 app 与各蓝图模板目录
steps.label_en: search app and blueprint template folders

flows.description_zh: 默认会话接口经 itsdangerous 与 TaggedJSONSerializer 在签名 Cookie 与会话对象之间编解码。
flows.description_en: The default session interface codecs between a signed cookie and the session object via itsdangerous and the TaggedJSONSerializer.

participants.name_zh: 标签化 JSON 序列化器

flows.description_zh: jsonify / dumps 经由应用可替换的 JSON 提供者把 Python 对象编码为 JSON 响应。
flows.description_en: jsonify / dumps encode Python objects into a JSON response through the app’s pluggable JSON provider.

flows.name_zh: 标签化 JSON 类型分发链
flows.description_zh: TaggedJSONSerializer 在已注册的 JSONTag 处理器链上逐一 check/tag,以紧凑表示非原生 JSON 类型。
flows.description_en: TaggedJSONSerializer walks the chain of registered JSONTag handlers, calling check/tag to compactly represent non-native JSON types.

steps.label_en: iterate order, call check(value) on each

steps.label_zh: 命中则返回 tag(value) 紧凑表示
steps.label_en: on match, return tag(value) compact form

flows.description_zh: 蓝图把延迟记录的路由与处理器在 register 时经 BlueprintSetupState 回放到应用路由表。
flows.description_en: A blueprint replays its deferred routes/handlers onto the app’s URL map at register time via BlueprintSetupState.

flows.description_zh: View.as_view 生成视图函数,请求到达时实例化并调用 dispatch_request;MethodView 按 HTTP 方法分派。
flows.description_en: View.as_view builds a view function; on a request it instantiates and calls dispatch_request, while MethodView dispatches by HTTP method.

steps.label_zh: 请求到达 → 调用视图函数
steps.label_en: on request → call the view function

steps.label_zh: 实例化 View 并 dispatch_request()
MethodView:按 HTTP 方法分派到 get/post/…
steps.label_en: MethodView: dispatch by HTTP method to get/post/…
